scripts.setup:db: corepack pnpm --filter @beach-tennis/db generate && corepack pnpm --filter @beach-tennis/db migrate
scripts.test:smoke: corepack pnpm --filter api build && corepack pnpm --filter web build
scripts.simulate:tournament: corepack pnpm --filter @beach-tennis/db generate && corepack pnpm --filter api simulate:tournament
